name: B.I.M.B.O. Academy
description:
Tired of your shortcomings, your parents signed you up to a special boarding school that promises nothing less than perfection out of their educational processes. You might lose a bit of yourself throughout, but it is all for the better.

Themes (NSFW): school, schoolgirl, teacher, bimbo, bimbofication, hypnosis, hypnotized, mind control, TF, body modifications, sluttification, abuse, CNC, DNC, Simulation, Sci-fi, submission. It's not designed for it to be too lewd and only smut oriented, but it definitely has that purpose. Please review and indicate shortcomings so that they can be fixed.
